body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Adds an option `land_spun_up_ic` to read integrated land initial conditions from file. By default, this will be true.

closes https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1289

analogous to https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1029/

## To Do
- [x] add an option to read from IC vs use some default values (e.g. for terraplanet)
- [x] add a shortrun exercising the "default values" (i.e. the previous behavior), since all other runs will use prescribed ICs
title: read land ICs from a file

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Remove the bucket `get_new_cache` function, and instead access the cached fields for total energy and water directly, which were added in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/pull/1104.

closes #1261
title: remove bucket get_new_cache
